login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Use your Flowless account. Two-factor verification appears when your instance requires it.
login.sideCopy: Auth, sessions, protected pages, theme, language, and client calls are wired for you.

register.title: Create your account.
register.subtitle: Use the starter account flow, then customize it for your app.
register.success: Account created successfully. Please sign in with your new credentials.

passwordReset.title: Recover access securely.
passwordReset.subtitle: Request a password reset link and return when your email arrives.
passwordReset.resetSubtitle: Set a fresh password to finish recovering your account.
passwordReset.success: Password reset successful. Please sign in with your new password.

home.checking: Checking your session and routing you to the right place.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: A clean starting point for your app backend and user session.
dashboard.modules: Instance modules can extend this user payload. The starter keeps it available from useAuth().

cards.authText: Session state and 2FA are handled by @pubflow/react.
cards.experienceText: Branding, language, and light or dark mode are ready from the first screen.
cards.deployText: Use TanStack Start for Node/Bun, Cloudflare, and Deno-friendly deployment paths.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Your current session identity and account data.
profile.details: Details from the active Pubflow session.
